case_title: SAIRA MALIK VS. FIDELITY NATIONAL TITLE INSURANCE COMPANY

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT FIDELITY NATIONAL TITLE INSURANCE COMPANY

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MALIK, SAIRA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FIDELITY NATIONAL TITLE INSURANCE COMPANY $3,333.00 PRINCIPAL, $99.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,432.50 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
